Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Further Answrs To Interrogatories And Compelling Response To Request For Production Of Documents And Compelling Response To Request For Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Strouss, Esq., (415-771-6174) for GRetchen Lemaistre, Plaintiff and moving party
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court having considered the moving, opposing and reply papers and the arguments of counsel, rules as follows:PLAINTIFF GRETCHEN LEMAISTRE Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Further Answrs To Interrogatories And Compelling Response To Request For Production Of Documents And Compelling Response To Request For Admissions And For Sanctions is Granted. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1000.00. Order signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
